source.title: Complete Guide to ChatGPT 5.6 + Prompting Guide
source.description:
Here's your complete guide to the new ChatGPT app - Download it free here: https://chatgpt.com/download/?utm_source=creator&utm_campaign=youtube&utm_content=partnership-mattwolfe

The complete guide to ChatGPT 5.6 and the new ChatGPT app, from someone who used 6.8 billion tokens on it in the last two weeks.

OpenAI just combined ChatGPT, Codex, their browser, and ChatGPT Work into one platform. The 5.6 models running underneath are the best I've used. In this video I walk through the full app, the prompts I actually use every day, and some of the wildest things the community has built with it.

I cover the personal assistant setup that reads everything in my business, ChatGPT Work mode, Codex for development, the Sites feature, scheduled tasks, real builds from the community, and the Wolf Control Tower I built just for myself to run Future Tools.
This video is sponsored by OpenAI. Everything I say is my honest experience.

Discover More:
🛠️ Explore AI Tools & News: https://futuretools.io/
📰 Weekly Newsletter: https://futuretools.io/newsletter
